name_cn:
NOÉ PURSE LV CHARMS Handbag #️⃣M57099
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to boutique specifications with dynamic chip code changing. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive authentic original fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, latest official website gift box!
11.5 x 11.5 x 11.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram Reverse coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Hardware
Suitcase-style metal corners
LV Circle embossed decoration
Circular LV monogram decoration
Drawstring closure
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 48.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 54.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 25.0 cm
Made in France
